title: asteriscus graveolens subsp. stenophyllus
intro: Asteriscus graveolens subsp. stenophyllus is a plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the Mexican tarragon or Mexican dwarf tarragon. The plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects, making it a valuable remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Asteriscus graveolens subsp. stenophyllus include its ability to alleviate digestive problems, reduce fever, and soothe respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds. The plant can be prepared as an herbal infusion, decoction, or tincture, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed for therapeutic purposes.
